lines.lyrics: Something's going wrong
The dominoes are falling in my head
And it won't take long till they get to the end
It's too hard to disarm
And goes off in my mind
People think I'm battling with something that isn't there
The winds are wailing, I'm fueled by a storm
That's got me headed straight for the rocks
I'm coming in hot, this is my spot
They bought me a ticket and sent me down south
To be a burden out in the street, I'm there but I'm not
The sidewalk is my home, I've been sitting here all day
The people rush by like the breeze from the bay
It's cold in the summer and it freezes my soul
And I wander and wander but there's no wonder no more
Can you help me out, my good luck's on a drought
Can't somebody save me, I been feeling like hell
Cause I'm trapped in this shell on a corner in paradise
People try to ignore and I lay on the floor
Icy hands rolled the cold dice
As the die hit the ground, there's an absence of sound
And the wind starts to carry me, it whispers sweet things to me
Finally I'm released
